/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/leap_avx2_bench.dir/wrappers/leap_bench.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leap_avx2_obj.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/SIMD_ED.cc.o CMakeFiles/leap_avx2_obj.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/SHD.cc.o CMakeFiles/leap_avx2_obj.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/mask.c.o CMakeFiles/leap_avx2_obj.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/print.c.o CMakeFiles/leap_avx2_obj.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/bit_convert.c.o CMakeFiles/leap_avx2_obj.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/shift.c.o CMakeFiles/leap_avx2_obj.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/popcount.c.o -o leap_avx2_bench
